title: psychotria avenis
intro: Psychotria avenis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the yellow bird's eye plant. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tinctures and ointments.
